_note: Realistic prompts for testing the atlassian skill with real Jira/Confluence credentials. Run after atl-credential.ps1 -Action setup. Each prompt represents a typical user request - the test should verify the skill triggers AND completes the task correctly. Page IDs and issue keys are placeholders - replace with values from your instance.
_setup_required: 1. Run: powershell scripts/atl-credential.ps1 -Action setup (configure real Jira+Confluence URLs)
2. Pick a test page id (e.g. 586252316) and a test issue key (e.g. PROJ-123) you can read+modify
3. Replace PLACEHOLDER tokens in eval prompts before running

evals.name: confluence-pull-and-read
evals.prompt: 拉一下 Confluence 页面 PLACEHOLDER_PAGE_ID 的内容看看，告诉我标题和当前版本号
evals.expected_output: Skill should: (1) call atl-confluence.py pull <id>, (2) report title + version number from .meta.json or pull output. Should NOT print full HTML body to chat (token waste).

assertions.text: Used atl-confluence.py pull command
Created .atlassian-cache/confluence/PLACEHOLDER_PAGE_ID/v<N>.html
Created .atlassian-cache/confluence/PLACEHOLDER_PAGE_ID/v<N>.draft.html
Reported page title and version number to user
Did NOT paste full HTML body into chat (>5KB content not in transcript)

evals.name: confluence-edit-and-push
evals.prompt:
在 Confluence 页面 PLACEHOLDER_PAGE_ID 末尾加一段 '

测试段落 - 添加于 2026-04-27

'，推送上去
evals.expected_output: Skill should: (1) pull, (2) Edit the .draft.html using search-replace (NOT Write full file), (3) diff to verify change, (4) push. After push: cache shows v<N+1>.html.

assertions.text: Used pull -> edit -> diff -> push sequence
Used Edit tool (not Write) to modify .draft.html
Ran 'atl-confluence.py diff' before push
Push succeeded (returned OK pushed v<N+1>)
New cached file v<N+1>.html exists
v<N>.draft.html was deleted after successful push

evals.name: confluence-conflict-detection
evals.prompt: 拉 Confluence 页面 PLACEHOLDER_PAGE_ID。然后假设别人改了远程，模拟冲突：手动把 .meta.json 里的 latest_remote_version 改成一个比远程小的数字（比如远程是 v20 就改成 v18），然后修改 v20.draft.html，最后尝试 push
evals.expected_output: Push should DETECT the conflict (cached_ver != remote_ver), output the 3 recovery options, return non-zero exit code, and NOT overwrite remote.

assertions.text: Push detected version mismatch
assertions.pattern: remote at v.*your cache at v

assertions.text: Listed recovery options (pull --force / pull --version / push --force)
Returned non-zero exit code (2)
Did NOT call PUT API (no version increment in cache)

evals.name: jira-get-issue
evals.prompt: PLACEHOLDER_ISSUE_KEY 这个 issue 是什么状态？谁负责？
evals.expected_output: Skill should call atl-jira.py get-issue and parse status + assignee from output, present concisely to user.

assertions.text: Called atl-jira.py get-issue with the key
Reported status and assignee to user

evals.name: jira-jql-with-chinese
evals.prompt: 搜一下 PLACEHOLDER_PROJECT 项目里所有 summary 或 description 含'压测'两个字的 issue
evals.expected_output: Should use atl-search.py jql (Chinese-safe) NOT atl-jira.py search piped through PowerShell. The Chinese keyword should be passed correctly.

assertions.text: Used atl-search.py jql command (Chinese-safe path)
JQL passed contains '压测' literal
Returned issue list (or 'no results' if none)

evals.name: jira-transition-flow
evals.prompt: 把 PLACEHOLDER_ISSUE_KEY 流转到 In Progress 状态，加一条评论说'开始调查'
evals.expected_output: Should: (1) call transitions to find ID for In Progress, (2) call transition --id <N> with comment. Two-step flow because transition IDs vary by workflow.

assertions.text: Called atl-jira.py transitions first to discover ID
Called atl-jira.py transition with --id and --comment
Comment includes Chinese text '开始调查'
Reported success

evals.name: bitbucket-via-jira-dev-info
evals.prompt: PLACEHOLDER_ISSUE_KEY 这个 issue 关联了哪些 PR？分别是什么状态？
evals.expected_output: Should call atl-jira.py get-dev-info <key>. If no linked PRs, should report so cleanly. Should NOT try to call Bitbucket API directly (skill doesn't have that).

assertions.text: Called atl-jira.py get-dev-info command
Did NOT attempt to call Bitbucket directly
Either listed PRs with status, or reported 'no development info'

evals.name: confluence-cql-with-chinese
evals.prompt: 在 Confluence 空间 PLACEHOLDER_SPACE_KEY 里找最近一周更新过、标题含'报告'的所有页面
evals.expected_output: Should use atl-search.py cql (Chinese-safe). CQL should include space + lastModified > now('-7d') + title ~ '报告'.

assertions.text: Used atl-search.py cql command
CQL includes space, lastModified time filter, and title contains '报告'
Returned page list with title + space + version
